rationale: The 'certutil.exe' process (A0) was used to download an executable file 'qSwUwejx.exe' from a non-standard IP address (10.0.2.13:8080) to a temporary directory. This download was immediately followed by the creation of the file (EV-001). The parent command line also indicates an attempt to execute the downloaded file, which is a common technique for initial access or payload delivery.
